title: Bholaa
subTitle: After getting out of prison with the desire to meet his daughter, Bholaa's plans are interrupted by a well-orchestrated drug bust.

title: Shoorveer 2
subTitle: Jeeva and Joshna set out to find a solution after learning that they are leading parallel lives with a couple living next door.

title: Bindi
subTitle: A medical student's life changes after his blood accidentally spills on the tomb of Pottu. The mysterious spirit possesses his body, causing him to behave like a girl.

title: Vedaa
subTitle: Vedaa, a victim of caste discrimination, trains as a boxer under Abhimanyu and strives to seek justice for the murder of her siblings.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Circus Car 2
subTitle: A group of young friends, keen on having a paranormal experience, ventures into a forest. They soon stumble upon an abandoned vehicle that appears to be possessed by an entity.

title: Jawab The Justice
subTitle: A surgeon living in the USA has a recurring dream and soon discovers that he was adopted and travels to India to learn about his biological parents.

title: Krrish
subTitle: After discovering his father's truth, Krrish must reveals his superpowers to the world and becomes the masked superhero.

title: K3 - Kaali Ka Karishma
subTitle: A young man, who lives happily with his family but is scared of ghosts, visits Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, with his family. There, he is soon possessed by a vengeful ghost with a sinister past.

title: Real Tevar
subTitle: Harsha is the idealistic scion of a self-made multimillionaire, Ravikanth. After a chance meeting with Charuseela leads him to a remote village, Harsha wishes to develop it with her help.

title: Wanted
subTitle: A sharpshooter is caught between a gangster who wants him dead since he knows too much, the police who want him for the information he holds and his girlfriend who yearns for him to mend his ways.

title: 90ML
subTitle: A man with fetal alcohol syndrome keeps himself alive by drinking a certain amount of alcohol. However, things change when he falls in love with a beautiful woman.

title: 90ML
subTitle: A man with fetal alcohol syndrome keeps himself alive by drinking a certain amount of alcohol. However, things change when he falls in love with a beautiful woman.

title: Shoorveer 2
subTitle: Jeeva and Joshna set out to find a solution after learning that they are leading parallel lives with a couple living next door.

title: Ek Aur Vinashak
subTitle: An honest man is forced to turn into a gangster as he strives to make enough money for the treatment of a girl who is comatose.

title: Vedaa
subTitle: Vedaa, a victim of caste discrimination, trains as a boxer under Abhimanyu and strives to seek justice for the murder of her siblings.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Bangarraju
subTitle: A deceased couple returns to Earth to help their grandson, who lost his way in life after familial and personal problems start to haunt him.

title: The Bhootnii
subTitle: After a heartbreak, Shantanu unknowingly summons a spirit named Mohabbat, whose obsessive presence begins to disrupt the peace of the entire college campus.

title: Aranmanai 4
subTitle: Suspicious about his sister's death, Saravanan, a lawyer, tries to solve the mystery behind it, only to discover a mysteriously dark force at play.

title: Game Changer
subTitle: A principled IAS officer battles systemic corruption, championing fair elections to uphold democratic integrity amidst political machinations.

title: Crew
subTitle: Three ambitious female cabin attendants from Mumbai get caught in a web of lies during their pursuit of dreams, leading to an unexpected heist.

title: Pushpa 2: The Rule
subTitle: A powerful smuggler goes head-to-head with a vengeful enemy while controlling politics and managing high-stakes confrontations. A public apology sparks a tense showdown, culminating in a challenge.

title: Antim: The Final Truth
subTitle: Rahul runs away from his poverty-stricken village life to become a gangster in the city. There, he locks horns with an upstanding policeman who tries to set him on the right path.

title: Antim: The Final Truth
subTitle: Rahul runs away from his poverty-stricken village life to become a gangster in the city. There, he locks horns with an upstanding policeman who tries to set him on the right path.

title: Raangi
subTitle: Thaiyal Nayagi tries to protect her niece from an online predator. However, things escalate when the FBI's attempt to catch the culprit puts them both in danger as they unwittingly become bait.

title: Police Police
subTitle: Ranadheer and Ravikanth, two policemen, turn foes after Ravikanth gets involved in antisocial activities. Ranadheer then plans to prove Ravikanth is the culprit.

title: Siddhu The Warrior
subTitle: A rich man does everything he can to restore his mother's failing health. However, finding no success, he follows the advice of a sage who tells him to turn into a beggar for 48 hours.

title: The Faith Show
subTitle: Romildo Ribeiro Soares, a Brazilian televangelist, stresses the importance of faith in the Almighty and explains inner life and how to condition it for the world.

title: Venky Mama
subTitle: Venkatarathnam raises Karthik, his orphaned nephew, on his own after the death of his parents. Things change when Karthik leaves suddenly leaves home without notice.

title: Entertainment
subTitle: Akhil, an underdog and a failure, comes to know that his real father is a rich diamond merchant who has just passed away. When he goes to retrieve his wealth, he learns that a dog has inherited it.

title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
subTitle: Pawan Chaturvedi rises above the divisive bounds of nationality and religion to help a little Pakistani girl stranded in India.

title: Sikandar
subTitle: A passionate young man faces off against a corrupted system, challenging the existing authorities and injustice that take away the rights of common people.

title: Baby John
subTitle: An indomitable policeman goes to greater lengths and leads a double life in order to protect his daughter from the criminal underworld.

title: Supreme Khiladi
subTitle: A charitable trust faces threats from a powerful mafia leader who has set his eyes on its land. He plans to kill the legal heir to grab the wealth, but a brave taxi driver becomes an impediment.

title: Real Tevar
subTitle: Harsha is the idealistic scion of a self-made multimillionaire, Ravikanth. After a chance meeting with Charuseela leads him to a remote village, Harsha wishes to develop it with her help.
